ddt:Target.Name: HU453_00.00.61.ddt
ddt:Target.Description: Note: A formal request/response parameter xx, yy, zz,... is only relevant, if its data have a formal specification within the same chapter.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: off / disabled due to low voltage
verified configuration for use in customer vehicle
input d_pitch + estimated d_yaw/roll + residual d_x/y tuning
improved input d_pitch + estimated d_yaw/roll tuning
improved input d_pitch + estimated d_yaw/roll + residual d_x/y tuning

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: Wiring Test BIC WakeUp Result Start
DataRead.Result and Timestamp Details of Last Flashtry Read

Test.Description: Over temperature – Control Module Processor
Over temperature – Internal Control Module Main Processor
Left front speaker 1 has a malfunction. shortcut to GND
Left front speaker 1 has a malfunction. shortcut to Ubatt
Left front speaker 1 has a malfunction. open load
Left front speaker 1 has a malfunction. Signal Cross Coupled
Right front speaker 1 has a malfunction. shortcut to GND
Right front speaker 1 has a malfunction. shortcut to Ubatt
Right front speaker 1 has a malfunction. open load
Right front speaker 1 has a malfunction. Signal Cross Coupled
Left rear speaker 1 has a malfunction. shortcut to GND
Left rear speaker 1 has a malfunction. shortcut to Ubatt
Left rear speaker 1 has a malfunction. open load
Left rear speaker 1 has a malfunction. Signal Cross Coupled
Right rear speaker 1 has a malfunction. shortcut to GND
Right rear speaker 1 has a malfunction. shortcut to Ubatt
Right rear speaker 1 has a malfunction. open load
Right rear speaker 1 has a malfunction. Signal Cross Coupled
The GPS antenna has a malfunction. Not Configured
Mic 1 shortcut to GND
Mic 1 shortcut to Ubatt
Mic 1 open load
The WLAN antenna has a malfunction. Not Configured
The USB connection has a malfunction. General Electrical Failure
The USB connection has a malfunction. Bus Signal / Message Failure
The USB connection has a malfunction. Circuit Open
HU internal AMP overtemperature Occure
The Bluetooth® module has a malfunction
HU internal DISP overtemperature Occure
The control unit ''Head unit'' has a malfunction. Not Configured
Battery voltage low
Battery voltage high
The output for the backup lamp has a malfunction. shortcut to GND
The output for the backup lamp has a malfunction. shortcut to Ubatt
The output for the backup lamp has a malfunction. open load
Fan 1 of the control unit has a malfunction. General Electrical Failures
Lost communication with RVC. Component Failure
No CAN 1 communication possible, CAN malfunction
CAN 1 timeout connection irregular messages
